sentences.target: Ich schlage das Wort im Wörterbuch nach.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈʃlaːɡə das vɔʁt ɪm ˈvœʁtɐˌbuːx naːx/

translations.de: Ich schlage das Wort im Wörterbuch nach.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈʃlaːɡə das vɔʁt ɪm ˈvœʁtɐˌbuːx naːx/
translations.en: I'm looking up the word in the dictionary.
translations.es: Busco la palabra en el diccionario.
translations.fr: Je cherche le mot dans le dictionnaire.
translations.it: Sto cercando la parola nel dizionario.
translations.ru: Я ищу это слово в словаре.
translations.pt: Estou procurando a palavra no dicionário.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tra từ này trong từ điển.
translations.ar: أنا أبحث عن الكلمة في القاموس.
translations.nl: Ik zoek het woord op in het woordenboek.
translations.uk: Я шукаю це слово в словнику.
translations.hi: मैं शब्द को शब्दकोश में देख रहा हूँ।
translations.nb: Jeg slår opp ordet i ordboka.
translations.id: Saya sedang mencari kata itu di kamus.
translations.sv: Jag slår upp ordet i ordboken.
translations.da: Jeg slår ordet op i ordbogen.
translations.ja: 辞書でその単語を調べています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; sentence subject.
Finite verb, 1st person singular present of the separable verb 'nachschlagen' (to look up); main predicate. Linked with particle 'nach' as separable verb.
Definite article; accusative neuter singular, marking 'Wort' as the direct object.
Neuter noun; accusative singular; direct object of the verb.
Preposition contracted with the dative article ('in dem'); introduces a dative prepositional phrase.
Neuter noun; dative singular as the object of the preposition 'im'; indicates location.
Separable verbal particle; combines with 'schlage' to form 'nachschlagen' ('to look up'), appearing clause-final.

sentences.target: Das Wörterbuch liegt neben meinem Laptop.

translations.de: Das Wörterbuch liegt neben meinem Laptop.
translations.en: The dictionary is next to my laptop.
translations.es: El diccionario está al lado de mi portátil.
translations.fr: Le dictionnaire est à côté de mon ordinateur portable.
translations.it: Il dizionario è accanto al mio portatile.
translations.zh-Hans: 字典在我的笔记本电脑旁边。
translations.yue: 字典喺我嘅手提電腦旁邊。
translations.ru: Словарь лежит рядом с моим ноутбуком.
translations.pt: O dicionário está ao lado do meu portátil.
translations.he: המילון נמצא ליד המחשב הנייד שלי.
translations.vi: Cuốn từ điển ở cạnh laptop của tôi.
translations.nl: Het woordenboek ligt naast mijn laptop.
translations.hu: A szótár a laptopom mellett van.
translations.hi: शब्दकोश मेरे लैपटॉप के पास है।
translations.el: Το λεξικό είναι δίπλα στο λάπτοπ μου.
translations.nb: Ordboka ligger ved siden av laptopen min.
translations.id: Kamus berada di sebelah laptop saya.
translations.da: Ordbogen ligger ved siden af min laptop.
translations.ja: 辞書は私のノートパソコンの横にあります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative neuter singular, marking 'Wörterbuch' as the subject.
Neuter noun; nominative singular; grammatical subject of the clause.
Finite verb, 3rd person singular present; intransitive predicate indicating location.
Preposition governing the dative; introduces a locative prepositional phrase.
Possessive determiner; dative masculine singular, agreeing with 'Laptop'.
Masculine noun; dative singular as the object of the preposition 'neben'.

sentences.target: Er hat das Wörterbuch zu Hause gelassen.
sentences.reading: /eːɐ hat das ˈvœʁtɐˌbuːx tsuː ˈhaʊ̯zə ɡəˈlasn/

translations.de: Er hat das Wörterbuch zu Hause gelassen.
translations.ipa: /eːɐ hat das ˈvœʁtɐˌbuːx tsuː ˈhaʊ̯zə ɡəˈlasn/
translations.en: He left the dictionary at home.
translations.fr: Il a laissé le dictionnaire à la maison.
translations.it: Ha lasciato il dizionario a casa.
translations.pt: Ele deixou o dicionário en casa.
translations.vi: Anh ấy để quyển từ điển ở nhà.
translations.nl: Hij heeft het woordenboek thuis laten liggen.
translations.hi: उसने शब्दकोश घर पर छोड़ दिया।
translations.nb: Han lot ordboka ligge igjen hjemme.
translations.ja: 彼は辞書を家に置いてきた。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; sentence subject.
Auxiliary verb, 3rd person singular present; forms the present perfect with the participle 'gelassen'.
Definite article; accusative neuter singular, marking 'Wörterbuch' as the direct object.
Neuter noun; accusative singular; direct object of the lexical verb.
Preposition governing the dative; used idiomatically with 'Hause' to mean 'at home'.
Noun in dative singular within the fixed expression 'zu Hause' ('at home'); adverbial locative phrase.
Past participle of 'lassen'; main lexical verb in the present perfect; takes 'das Wörterbuch' as its object.

sentences.target: Wir kaufen ein kleines Wörterbuch für die Reise.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ ˈkaʊ̯fn aɪ̯n ˈklaɪ̯nəs ˈvœʁtɐˌbuːx fyːɐ diː ˈʁaɪ̯zə/

translations.de: Wir kaufen ein kleines Wörterbuch für die Reise.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ ˈkaʊ̯fn aɪ̯n ˈklaɪ̯nəs ˈvœʁtɐˌbuːx fyːɐ diː ˈʁaɪ̯zə/
translations.en: We're buying a small dictionary for the trip.
translations.es: Estamos comprando un diccionario pequeño para el viaje.
translations.fr: Nous achetons un petit dictionnaire pour le voyage.
translations.it: Compriamo un piccolo dizionario per il viaggio.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们为旅行买一本小字典。
translations.yue: 我哋為咗旅行買一本細字典。
translations.ru: Мы покупаем маленький словарь для поездки.
translations.pt: Estamos comprando um dicionário pequeno para a viagem.
translations.tr: Seyahat için küçük bir sözlük alıyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang mua một cuốn từ điển nhỏ cho chuyến đi.
translations.nl: We kopen een klein woordenboek voor de reis.
translations.uk: Ми купуємо невеликий словник для подорожі.
translations.hu: Veszünk egy kis szótárt az útra.
translations.hi: हम यात्रा के लिए एक छोटा शब्दकोश खरीद रहे हैं।
translations.el: Αγοράζουμε ένα μικρό λεξικό για το ταξίδι.
translations.nb: Vi kjøper en liten ordbok til reisen.
translations.id: Kami sedang membeli kamus kecil untuk perjalanan.
translations.sv: Vi köper en liten ordbok till resan.
translations.ro: Cumpărăm un dicționar mic pentru călătorie.
translations.da: Vi køber en lille ordbog til rejsen.
translations.ja: 旅行のために小さな辞書を買っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; sentence subject.
Finite verb, 1st person plural present; transitive main predicate.
Indefinite article; accusative neuter singular, marking 'Wörterbuch' as the direct object.
Attributive adjective; accusative neuter singular, agrees with 'Wörterbuch'.
Neuter noun; accusative singular; direct object of 'kaufen'.
Preposition governing the accusative; introduces a purpose-related prepositional phrase.
Definite article; accusative feminine singular, marking 'Reise' as the object of 'für'.
Feminine noun; accusative singular; complement of the preposition 'für'.
